name: First Time Seen Remote Named Pipe
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Samir Bousseaden
SIGMA Title: First Time Seen Remote Named Pipe
SIGMA Description: This detection excludes known namped pipes accessible remotely and notify on newly observed ones, may help to detect lateral movement and remote exec using named pipes

False positives:
- Update the excluded named pipe to filter out any newly observed legit named pipe

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%atsvc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%samr%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsarpc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsass%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%winreg%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%netlogon%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%srvsvc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%protected_storage%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wkssvc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%browser%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%netdfs%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%svcctl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%spoolss%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntsvcs%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsm_api_service%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hydralspipe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%termsrv_api_service%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msftewds%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sql\query%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%eventlog%'))) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY First Time Seen Remote Named Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$') AND (NOT((LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%atsvc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%samr%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsarpc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsass%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%winreg%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%netlogon%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%srvsvc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%protected_storage%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%wkssvc%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%browser%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%netdfs%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%svcctl%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%spoolss%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%ntsvcs%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%lsm_api_service%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%hydralspipe%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%termsrv_api_service%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%msftewds%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%sql\query%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%eventlog%'))) AQL filter query
